text: Stepping from the bright, sterile hallway into the vibrant and intellectually stimulating gallery, I feel an energetic curiosity awaken in me. The bold R+D sign and the words about innovative research spark a sense of possibility, as if I am at the threshold of discovery. I am both grounded by the quiet order of the outside world and uplifted by the creative chaos of the displays. There is anticipation here, as if ideas are waiting to leap out and reshape my understanding.
